programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: A perilous criminal Sultan raises an orphan, who also grows up to become a criminal, known as Badshah. Badshah changes his ways after he falls in love with a street performer Sapna, but Sultan returns to remind Sultan of his past.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: A perilous criminal Sultan raises an orphan, who also grows up to become a criminal, known as Badshah. Badshah changes his ways after he falls in love with a street performer Sapna, but Sultan returns to remind Sultan of his past.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: A perilous criminal Sultan raises an orphan, who also grows up to become a criminal, known as Badshah. Badshah changes his ways after he falls in love with a street performer Sapna, but Sultan returns to remind Sultan of his past.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.
